list.name: Changes
list.comment: feat: update application configurations and add CI/CD pipeline

project.component: { "keyToString": { "JUnit.All Backend Tests.executor": "Run", "JUnit.Alle Tests.executor": "Coverage", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-DatabaseConfigFileWatcher.found": "New/updated database configurations found", "Notification.DoNotAsk-DatabaseConfigFileWatcher.found": "true", "RequestMappingsPanelOrder0": "0", "RequestMappingsPanelOrder1": "1", "RequestMappingsPanelWidth0": "75", "RequestMappingsPanelWidth1": "75", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "Spring Boot.BackendApplication Local.executor": "Run", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "cd-pipeline", "git.auto.fetch.suggestion.counter": "3", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/Users/johannes/IdeaProjects/goaldone/goaldone-projekt/backend/src/main/resources", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "npm.start.executor": "Run", "npm.test.executor": "Run", "prettierjs.PrettierConfiguration.Package": "/Users/johannes/IdeaProjects/goaldone/goaldone-projekt/frontend/node_modules/prettier", "project.structure.last.edited": "Modules", "project.structure.proportion": "0.15", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.2", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "ts.external.directory.path": "/Users/johannes/IdeaProjects/goaldone/goaldone-projekt/frontend/node_modules/typescript/lib", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary: feat: add OpenAPI client generation and health check endpoints
chore: rename CI jobs for clarity and update workspace configuration

feat: add Docker Compose infrastructure for Zitadel IdP setup
- Create docker-compose.yml with Traefik, PostgreSQL, and Zitadel services - Traefik configured for reverse proxy with Let's Encrypt (Cloudflare DNS challenge) - PostgreSQL with named volume for persistent data storage - Zitadel with initial organization and superadmin account setup - gRPC passthrough configuration for Zitadel API compatibility - .env.example for all required configuration variables - .gitignore to prevent committing sensitive environment files - Comprehensive README with setup, deployment, and troubleshooting guides
This implements the VPS infrastructure foundation for authentication. OIDC application configuration will be handled in a subsequent ticket.
feat: add Docker Compose setup for ZITADEL with environment configuration and README updates
feat: implement JIT provisioning for users and organizations with security configuration updates

feat: integrate Zitadel OAuth2/OIDC for user authentication and authorization
- Implement user info retrieval from Zitadel - Add auth guard for route protection - Configure environment variables for local development - Update application configuration for OAuth2 client - Create setup script for environment configuration - Remove unused user profile fields from the database

feat: add start page and integrate PrimeNG theme
- Create StartPageComponent with routing - Implement GoaldoneTheme for PrimeNG - Update app configuration to include PrimeNG providers - Refactor TestPageComponent to use external template - Add user info display and logout functionality in TestPageComponent
Implement user identity linking: add exception classes, repositories, services, and controllers for account linking functionality
Implement user identity linking: add exception classes, repositories, services, and controllers for account linking functionality
feat: enhance account linking functionality with new endpoints and user organization resolution
feat: enhance account linking functionality with new endpoints and user organization resolution
feat: update development environment configuration for ZITADEL and PostgreSQL
feat: update application configurations and add CI/CD pipeline

MESSAGE.value: feat: add OpenAPI client generation and health check endpoints
chore: rename CI jobs for clarity and update workspace configuration

feat: add Docker Compose infrastructure for Zitadel IdP setup
- Create docker-compose.yml with Traefik, PostgreSQL, and Zitadel services - Traefik configured for reverse proxy with Let's Encrypt (Cloudflare DNS challenge) - PostgreSQL with named volume for persistent data storage - Zitadel with initial organization and superadmin account setup - gRPC passthrough configuration for Zitadel API compatibility - .env.example for all required configuration variables - .gitignore to prevent committing sensitive environment files - Comprehensive README with setup, deployment, and troubleshooting guides
This implements the VPS infrastructure foundation for authentication. OIDC application configuration will be handled in a subsequent ticket.
feat: add Docker Compose setup for ZITADEL with environment configuration and README updates
feat: implement JIT provisioning for users and organizations with security configuration updates

feat: integrate Zitadel OAuth2/OIDC for user authentication and authorization
- Implement user info retrieval from Zitadel - Add auth guard for route protection - Configure environment variables for local development - Update application configuration for OAuth2 client - Create setup script for environment configuration - Remove unused user profile fields from the database

feat: add start page and integrate PrimeNG theme
- Create StartPageComponent with routing - Implement GoaldoneTheme for PrimeNG - Update app configuration to include PrimeNG providers - Refactor TestPageComponent to use external template - Add user info display and logout functionality in TestPageComponent
Implement user identity linking: add exception classes, repositories, services, and controllers for account linking functionality
feat: enhance account linking functionality with new endpoints and user organization resolution
feat: update development environment configuration for ZITADEL and PostgreSQL
feat: update application configurations and add CI/CD pipeline

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: feat: update application configurations and add CI/CD pipeline
